step_rationale: Platelet activation marker; microvesicle-mediated thrombosis and coagulation.
mechanism: Platelet-derived extracellular vesicles released during activation amplify thrombin generation and fibrin formation, contributing to occlusive thrombus propagation in Type 1 MI.

references.title: Platelet extracellular vesicles as biomarkers for arterial thrombosis.

trials.title: Antiplatelet Therapy Effect on Platelet Extracellular Vesicles in Acute Myocardial Infarction
